title: Unprecedented, worried for our safety: Rohini judges say protesting lawyers blocked their exit
description: Lawyers on strike at the Rohini Court allegedly stopped judges from leaving the court on Monday evening, forcing them to stay on the premises even after they had finished their work.Two judges posted at the Rohini Court confirmed the development to Bar & Bench, adding that the judges' exit was blocked for nearly 40 minutes. A senior judge said that he had never seen such a situation in over 20 years of his judicial career. “This was unprecedented. They blocked the exit of judges. I have
